name: Study 4: MACE Incidence by Sex — Triad vs Dyad Comparison
description: Sex-stratified MACE rates comparing cardiometabolic triad vs dyad cohorts.

design_json.description: Sex-stratified MACE incidence rates in both triad and dyad cardiometabolic cohorts. Sex differences in MACE risk are well-established; this analysis assesses whether the cardiometabolic burden-MACE relationship is modified by sex.
